title: Durability Overlay Diamond
description:
Diamond Armor Durability Overlay 
Shows Durability By changing its color.
body:
Changes Diamond Armor color according to its durability.

Durability colour changes on every 10% armor damge, from durability 100% to 10%.

made extra 2 durability color for intense pvp.

from 10% Armor durability, color changes on every 5% armor damage. 

**This Pack Needs Optifine; Use [CitResewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) for older versions, [Variants-Cit](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) for latest minecraft versions for Fabric Mod**

**Also Subscribe to my YouTube Channel [IndianBattles](https://www.youtube.com/@IndianBattlesOfficial)**
